opportunity.title: Partner ClearLine shoppable CTV
opportunity.thesis: Magnite published shoppable CTV templates — creative can ride supply.
opportunity.whyItMatters: Fast commerce-CTV path without SSP plumbing.
opportunity.move: Pilot one CPG brand already on Kargo mobile.

evidence.title: Magnite ClearLine adds shoppable CTV templates
evidence.summary: Supply-side shoppable CTV formats create an opening for Kargo creative + measurement to plug into premium CTV paths.
evidence.rawExcerpt: Publishers using ClearLine can offer interactive shoppable overlays on CTV inventory…

competitors.name: Magnite
competitors.summary: Supply-side CTV leader; partnerships and formats matter more than head-to-head DSP competition for Kargo.

learnings.title: Shoppable CTV is a supply-side opening
learnings.lesson: ClearLine templates are public; creative can plug in without SSP build.
learnings.quickWin: Pilot one CPG brand on ClearLine shoppable CTV + Kargo measurement.

confidenceBreakdown.note: Public sources only. Confidence = corroboration across independent marked sources.
